articles.title: Lil Wayne secretly engaged to woman in 20s after ending on-and-off relationship with Denise Bidot
articles.description: Rapper Lil Wayne is reportedly engaged again to a woman in her twenties from Indiana, according to TMZ. This news follows a tumultuous period for the artist, including recent public statements about feeling overlooked in the music industry and a public breakup with ex-girlfriend Denise Bidot, who made accusations of emotional and physical abuse.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Khaled Hosseini: ‘Children aren't coloring books. You don't get to...’ – ‘The Kite Runner’ author shares a lesson on identity and parenting
articles.description: Khaled Hosseini, author of 'The Kite Runner', cautions against imposing parental dreams on children, likening them to unique individuals, not coloring books. His quote emphasizes autonomy and the dangers of love demanding replication over understanding. Hosseini's works often explore how external expectations, from family to society, shape characters' identities and struggles.

articles.title: Knox rocks Angelina's 90s look amid comparisons to Brad
articles.description: Knox Jolie-Pitt has turned heads with a vibrant orange hair transformation, reminiscent of his mother Angelina Jolie's iconic 1999 look. This bold change follows recent buzz about his striking resemblance to father Brad Pitt at his sister Zahara's graduation. Knox, the youngest of the Jolie-Pitt children, continues to explore his style, drawing comparisons to his famous parents.

articles.title: “He hates the limitations": Travis Kelce reportedly finding life with Taylor Swift harder in one unexpected way
articles.description: With Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding reportedly just weeks away, new reports claim the Chiefs star is still adjusting to the intense security measures that come with dating one of the world's biggest celebrities. Sources say Kelce misses the freedom of spontaneous outings and last-minute plans but understands why the precautions are necessary. Despite finding the restrictions challenging, insiders insist he remains deeply committed to Swift and their future together.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Mae West: 'Getting married is like trading the adoration of many for the sarcasm of one...' - A witty observation about the shift from romance to reality in married life, by one of America's boldest stars
articles.description: Mae West’s famous quote about marriage reflects her trademark mix of humour and sharp social observation that made her one of old Hollywood’s most recognisable personalities. Known for her bold dialogue, witty one-liners and fearless approach to discussing love and relationships, West built a career challenging conservative attitudes through comedy. From her early days in vaudeville and controversial Broadway plays to becoming a major Hollywood star in the 1930s, she remained influential for her independent image, clever writing style and lasting impact on entertainment and popular culture.

articles.title: "That boy was crying": Cardi B and Stefon Diggs face viral paternity rumor after explosive Offset claim
articles.description: A viral social media post has sparked intense speculation involving Cardi B, Stefon Diggs, and Offset after claiming a DNA test allegedly revealed unexpected paternity results. The post quickly gained traction online and fueled widespread debate among fans. However, no verified evidence has been presented to support the allegations, and none of the parties involved have publicly confirmed the claims. For now, the story remains an unverified rumor driven largely by social media discussion.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly ‘relieved’ by Blake Lively setback as wedding guest list finally reveals if she’ll attend the big day
articles.description: Taylor Swift is reportedly focused on her upcoming wedding to Travis Kelce while keeping an eye on Blake Lively’s ongoing legal battle with Justin Baldoni. Reports claim Swift feels relieved by recent developments and wants the controversy resolved before her wedding. Meanwhile, speculation continues over Lively’s place in Swift’s inner circle after her name was reportedly absent from pre-wedding celebration plans, fueling questions about whether she will attend the wedding.

Her album debuted at No. 4 on the Billboard 200 and produced the hit “Folded,” which became a record-breaking R&B airplay leader and earned two Grammy Awards.

articles.title: Love quote of the day by Jane Austen: “A woman is not to marry a man merely because..."
articles.description: “A woman is not to marry a man merely because she is asked, or because he is attached to her, and can write a tolerable letter.”— Jane Austen, Emma (1815)Written over two centuries ago, this line from Jane Austen still feels startlingly modern. It quietly pushes back against the pressure many women—then and now—feel to say “yes” simply because a proposal has been offered, because someone is fond of them, or because they seem “good enough.” For Austen, marriage should not be a reflex to a proposal; it should be a thoughtful, intentional choice.In her novels, Austen often explores the dangers of marrying for security, status, or convenience. Here, she adds one more layer: don’t marry just because the opportunity is there, or because you’re flattered, or because the man knows how to write a decent letter. A life‐changing decision, in her view, deserves more than momentary comfort or social approval.

articles.title: ‘Gangs Of Wasseypur’ editor slams FWICE for acting against Ranveer Singh while ignoring 242 editors for 3 years, ‘Where was this efficiency?'
articles.description: Film editor Shweta Venkat slammed FWICE for banning Ranveer Singh over the 'Don 3' dispute while ignoring 242 editors' grievances for three years. Calling the ban "cute," she questioned the federation's selective efficiency. Ranveer's spokesperson meanwhile maintained that the actor chose silence out of "dignity, maturity and mutual respect."

articles.title: Blue Moon To Light Up Sky On May 31: Know Significance, Time And How You Can Watch Rare Full Moon In India
articles.description:
The final days of May are bringing an unusual sight to the night sky. On May 31, 2026, skywatchers will witness a Blue Moon, a rare lunar event that appears only once every few years and often draws attention because of its unusual name.

This year's event is even more notable because the Blue Moon will also be a micromoon, meaning it will appear slightly smaller than usual as the Moon will be farther from Earth at the time.

The full moon is expected to occur at around 8:45 UTC on May 31, 2026.

ALSO READ: Delhi Shoppers Can Hire Assistants To Carry Bags, Wait In Queues; Internet Says 'That's Called A Husband'

What The Blue Moon Really Is?

A Blue Moon is an 'extra' full moon that occurs because the Moon's cycle does not perfectly match the calendar.

The lunar cycle lasts around 29.5 days, while calendar months typically have 30 or 31 days. Because of this difference, there are times when two full moons appear within the same month. The second full moon in such cases is called a 'monthly Blue Moon.'

This upcoming event falls into that category, with one full moon already having appeared earlier in May and the second arriving on May 31.

Where And When Can You See The Blue Moon In India?

The Blue Moon will be visible from most parts of the world, including India.

Skywatchers can look for it on the night of May 30–31, 2026. The ideal time to watch will be just after sunset when the Moon rises, while late evening to early night is expected to offer clearer viewing conditions.

For the best experience, observers are advised to choose locations with clear skies and stay away from areas with heavy light pollution. Looking towards the eastern horizon after sunset may offer the best view.

Why This Blue Moon Is Special?

Blue Moons are relatively rare and usually occur once every two to three years, which is also where the phrase 'once in a blue moon' comes from.

What makes this event stand out further is that it is the only Blue Moon expected in 2026.

Astronomers also note that monthly Blue Moons can only happen in months with 30 or 31 days, which means February can never experience one. The event also reflects the interesting mismatch between the human calendar and the Moon's natural cycle.

Will The Moon actually Turn Blue On May 31?

Despite its name, the Moon will not appear blue.

A Blue Moon generally looks like any other full moon, as the term refers only to timing rather than colour.

In rare cases, atmospheric conditions caused by volcanic eruptions, smoke, or dust particles can make the Moon appear bluish. However, those events are extremely uncommon and are not connected to the Blue Moon phenomenon itself.

The line, "Why do I and everyone I love pick people who treat us like we're nothing?" resonates deeply, highlighting the connection between low self-esteem and accepting toxic treatment.

articles.title: Palak Purswani and Rohan Khanna to marry in Coimbatore on June 26 - EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: Palak Purswani and Rohan Khanna are set to marry in Coimbatore on June 26 after multiple changes in their wedding plans. The couple initially planned a destination wedding and even finalised Jordan as their venue before geopolitical tensions forced them to rethink. Reflecting on the shift, Palak shares that the experience made them question what truly matters, steering them towards a more rooted celebration in India. Both she and Rohan, who describe themselves as spiritual, now prefer a simpler ceremony aligned with their beliefs. She adds that recent circumstances and broader messages about celebrating India also influenced their decision.
